verdict_reasoning: SRC is a non-receptor tyrosine kinase that resides on the cytoplasmic (inner) leaflet of the plasma membrane and intracellular membranes. It is myristoylated and palmitoylated at its N-terminus, anchoring it to the cytoplasmic face of the PM — not the extracellular face. No transmembrane domain, no GPI anchor, no extracellular domain exists. Its kinase activity and SH2/SH3 domains all face the cytoplasm. No documented extracellular surface pool or stable TM-partner tethering places it on the outer leaflet.
